jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Snapdeal - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!
